_meta.notes: Placeholder stub. Sessions not yet written.

wrong_answer_tracking.behaviour: Wrong answers go to back of current session queue.
wrong_answer_tracking.wrong_count_usage: Feed to Gemini system prompt for AI Practice.

alam_mo_ba: Taglish isn't laziness or broken Tagalog. It's a fully rule-governed code-switch. The rule: affixes are always Tagalog, roots and nouns can be English. Break that rule and it sounds wrong to native speakers.
completion_reward.alam_mo_ba_display: Show 1 random fun fact on lesson completion screen.

progress_ring.display: Ring animates from X/5 to (X+1)/5 on session completion
